name: Aurora UI PPT Image Template
description: Polished AI product workflow template with luminous gradients, layered cards, and dashboard-like capability panels.

typography.title: large Chinese title with technical English proper nouns preserved

effects.depth: layered glass-like panels with readable foreground

page_types.name: Product Workflow
page_types.layout_archetype: hero title, central connected workflow cards, right capability panel, bottom rollout strip

page_types.name: Capability Dashboard
page_types.layout_archetype: dashboard cards with one prominent capability map

prompt_recipe.style: Deep navy Aurora UI, cyan/violet/mint luminous gradients, connected workflow cards, abstract product panels.
prompt_recipe.content_policy: Use abstract UI widgets unless real product screenshots are supplied; do not invent logos or app screens.
prompt_recipe.text_policy: Chinese title and labels must remain dominant and legible.
